description: Triggers for interview preparation including STAR stories, question prep, and company research

queries.query: Help me prepare for my PM interview at Google next week
Generate STAR stories from my background for behavioral interviews
I have a final round at Netflix — create comprehensive interview prep
Prepare me for the system design round in my engineering interview
Create practice questions and answers for my sales director interview
Help me prepare STAR examples from my resume for a leadership interview
Generate common interview questions for a data science role and help me answer them
Prep me for a 5-interview loop at Amazon for a Senior SWE role
I need interview preparation that covers behavioral, technical, and culture fit rounds
Create a prep guide for my VP Engineering interview including executive presence tips
Write a cover letter for a software engineer job
Optimize my resume for ATS systems
Compare my two job offers
Help me negotiate my salary
Update my LinkedIn profile for engineering roles
Analyze this job description for fit with my background
Create a reference list for my applications
Write bullet points for my resume
Build an academic CV for faculty applications
Explain what dynamic programming is
